verses.text: Pasian' Tapa Jesuh Khrih tawh kisai Lungdamna Thu hih bang ahi hi
Kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho sungah, “Nangma mai-ah ka kamtaipa ka sawl a, amah in na paina ding lampi a bawlkhol ding hi
Gamsungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topa' paina ding lampi bawl un la, a tot ding lampi tangsak un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a kigelhna tawh hong kipankhia hi
Tua mah bangin gamsungah Johan hong vak a, mawhna kisikin tui kiphum un; tua hi leh na mawhna uh Pasian in hong maisak ding hi, ci-in thu a hilh hi
Johan' thuhilhna a ngai dingin Jerusalem khua-a kipan Judea gamsunga om mi khempeuhte a hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a mawhnate uh va pulak uh a, Jordan Gun sungah Johan in amaute a tuiphum hi
Johan in kalaoh mul kigan puan silhin, savun kawnggak tawh a kawng gak a, kauphe leh gamlak khuaizu tawh a kivak hi
Amah in mite tungah thu hilh a, “Ka nungah hong pai dingpa pen kei sangin nakpi takin lianzaw a, kunin a khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawmzo kei hi
Keimah in tui sungah note kong phum a, amah in Kha Siangtho sungah note hong phum ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua laitakin Galilee gamsunga om Nazareth khua panin Jesuh hong pai a, Jordan Gun sungah Johan in amah a tuiphum hi
Tui sung panin Jesuh a thawhkhiat khit phetin vantung kihongin, ama tungah vakhu bangin Kha Siangtho a hong kumsuk a mu hi
Vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Nang pen ka it mahmah ka Tapa na hi a, nang tungah ka lungkim mahmah hi,” a ci hi.
Thakhat thu-in Kha Siangtho in gamlakah Jesuh a paisak hi
Gamlakah ni sawmli sung om a, Satan in tua hun sungteng a ze-et hi. Tua lai-ah gamsa gilote zong om a, ahi zongin vantung mite hong pai-in amah huhin an a vak uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in A Nasep Galilee Gamah Kipan

verses.text: Thong sungah Johan a kikhiat khit ciangin Galilee gamsungah Jesuh hong pai a, Pasian kiang panin hong pai Lungdamna Thuthak gen a
“A hunhoih hong tungta a, Pasian' Uk ding hun hong kipanta hi. Na mawhna uh kisikkik un la, hih Lungdamna Thuthak um un,” ci-in a hilh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Ngabeng Mi Li Sam

verses.text: Galilee Tuili gei tawnin Jesuh a pai laitakin, Simon leh a nau Andru, ngabengte ahih manun, ngen tawh nga khuhin a om a mu hi
Jesuh in amaute gel kiangah, “Kei hong zui un; nga mat bangin mi tampi a huaite kong suaksak ding hi,” a ci hi
Amaute gel in zong a ngen uh nusia-in Jesuh a zuipah uh hi
Tawmkhat a pai khit ciangin Zebedi' tapa James leh a nau Johan zong, a gunkuang tung uhah a ngen uh khui-in a om a mu leuleu hi
Jesuh in amaute a muh phetin sampah a, amaute gel in zong a pa uh Zebedi leh a thacialte uh nusia-in Jesuh' nung a zui uh hi.
Tua ciangin Kapernaum khua tung uh a, a Sabbath ni-in kikhopna inn sungah Jesuh pai-in thu hilh ding a kipan hi
A thuhilhna a za mi khempeuh in ama thugenna zia hangin lamdang a sa uh hi. Amah in Thukham hilh siate bangin thu genloin aana nei mite bangin thu a genzaw hi
Tua laitakin kikhopna inn sungah dawivei mi khat hong lut a
“Nazareth khuami Jesuh aw, kote tawh nang bang kisai ihi hiam? Kote a susia dingin hih lai-ah hong om na hi hiam? Pasian' mi siangtho na hihlam kong thei hi,” ci-in a kiko hi
Jesuh in, “Pau kei in; hih mipa sung panin paikhia in,” ci-in tua dawi tungah thu a pia hi
Dawi gilo in tua mipa kongkaw sakin a lin'sakgawp khit ciangin nakpi takin awngin ama sung panin a paikhia hi

Mi khempeuh in lamdangsa uh a, khatlekhat in, “A bangci thu ahi hiam? Bang thuthak hilh tuan ahi hiam? Hih mipa in dawi gilote thupiakna ding aana nei a, dawi gilote in ama thu a mang uh hi,” ci-in a kikum uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin hih Jesuh' thu in Galilee gamsung khempeuh thakhatin a zelpak hi.
Tua ciangin kikhopna inn panin amaute paikhia-in Simon leh a nau Andru' inn-ah paisuakpah uh a, James leh a nau Johan in zong a zui uh hi
Simon' sungnu nattunin lupna ngak a, Jesuh a tun'phetin tuanu' natna thu ama kiangah kigen hi
Amah zong tuanu kiangah pai a, a khutin lenin a phongto hi. A natna dam a, a zinte zong a dozo pah hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Nitakin Mi Tampi Damsak

verses.text: Tua nitak lam, ni a tum khit ciangin mite in Jesuh kiangah cina khempeuh leh dawivei khempeuh a hong paipih uh hi
Tua khuami khempeuh a inntualah hong kikhawm uh hi
Jesuh in natna namkim a vei mi tampi damsak a, dawi tampi tak zong a hawlkhia hi. Dawite in Jesuh thei uh ahih manin, Jesuh in dawite thu gensaklo hi.
A zing ciang phalvak ma-in Jesuh tho-in gamdaihna mun khatah na pai-in thu a ngen hi
Ahi zongin Simon leh a lawmte in Jesuh a zong dingin nungzuih uh a
amah a muh uh ciangin, “Mi khempeuh in nang hong kan uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Jesuh in, “Hih kimnai-a om khuadangte-ah pai ni. Keima hong paina pen thuhilh ding ahih manin tua khuate-ah thu ka hilh ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Galilee gamsung khempeuhah amah zin a, a kikhopna uh innte-ah thu hilhin dawite a hawlkhia hi.
Miphak khat Jesuh kiangah hong pai-in khukdin' a, “Topa aw, hong damsak nuam peuh lecin nong damsak thei ding hi,” ci-in a thum hi
Jesuh in hehpihhuaisa ahih manin a khut zanin lawng a, “Nang kong damsak nuam hi,” a ci hi
Thakhat thu-in a phaknatna bei-in a damsiang hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in khauhtakin ama tungah thu genin paikhiasak pah a
“Hih thu kuama kiangah gen kei in. Siampipa kiangah paisuak pahin amah kivelsak in. Tua ciangin na damsiangna thu mi khempeuh in a theihna dingin Moses thupiaksa bangin biakpiakna bawl in,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin a mipa paikhia-in a paina khempeuhah hih thupiang khempeuh gen belin a nei hi. Hih thu nakgen lua-in kitheithang gawp ahih manin, tua huna kipanin mite' theihin khuasungah Jesuh lut thei nawnlo hi. Tua ahih manin gamdaihna munah amah om a, mun khempeuh panin ama kiangah mite a hong pai uh hi.
